title: Kronstadt Asset Management Ltd - Withdrawal of Small AIFM licence
text:
08 April 2026
CYSEC Board Decision
Announcement date: 08.04.2026 Board decision date: 09.03.2026
Regarding: Kronstadt Asset Management Ltd
Legislation: The Small Alternative Investment Fund Managers Law
Subject: Withdrawal of Small AIFM licence
Judicial Review: Click here Judicial Review Click here
Ruling:
The Board of the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (‘CySEC’) announces that, on its
meeting of 9 March 2026, decided to withdraw the Small Alternative Investment Fund
Manager authorisation of the company Kronstadt Asset Management Ltd (‘the Company’) (LEI
984500FCE930F05BP922), with Number SMAIFM2, pursuant to article 12(3)(a) of the Small
Alternative Investment Fund Managers Law of 2020, ('the Law'), since the Company no longer
meets the conditions under which the Small AIFM authorisation was granted, and specifically:
(a) of section 7(1)(a) of the Law, regarding the requirement that the Company is able to meet
the requirements under the Law,
(b) of section 7(1)(b) of the Law, regarding the obligation to have the required initial capital,
(c) of section 7(1)(d) of the Law, regarding the requirement of the Company to employ at
least two (2) persons as senior management personnel, and
(d) of section 7(1)(e) of the Law, regarding the suitability of the shareholders of the
Company, taking into account the need to ensure the sound and prudent management of
the Company.
Full details/justification of the CySEC’s decision are/is available in the Greek text of the
announcement.
mv/vs
legislation: The Small Alternative Investment Fund Managers Law
